revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-060

A light either on a fixed support or on a buoy, marking the limit of a navigable channel.


Note: In French, the term Feu de Rive is commonly used for a channel light on a fixed support.


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Channel Light}}
